summary: Generated the requested single runnable helper script artifact as a conservative inbox wrapper that reuses the reviewed delegate artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py, resolves relative paths portably, enforces sidecar report handoff via --report-json, applies explicit timeout handling, preserves parameter-driven input/output behavior, keeps dry-run and zero-discovery outcomes reviewable/partial, and requires strong delegate evidence before claiming success.
notes: Produced exactly one script artifact and did not invent extra files.
Wrapper is designed for readonly Trello smoke semantics: no external writeback is implied; local filesystem output may occur when dry_run=false.
Wrapper prefers delegate sidecar JSON as canonical evidence and only falls back to stdout JSON parsing if sidecar evidence is unavailable.

Success is gated on delegate evidence including status=success, total_files>=1, dry_run=false, status_counter.failed=0, status_counter.partial=0, excel_written=true, output_exists=true, and output_size_bytes>0.
If OCR runtime is reported as blocked/partial while OCR mode is auto/on, wrapper downgrades to partial with explicit limitations.
